# Pathway sinh(observed/expected) correlations 

```{r}
library(here)
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)

# read in up TB pathways
microarray_up_pathways = list.files(path = here("data/v2/microarray_pathways/up/"), 
                            all.files = FALSE, 
                            full.names = FALSE, 
                            recursive = FALSE,
                            pattern = "^allterms.*_up\\.tsv$")
rnaseq_up_pathways = list.files(path = here("data/v2/RNAseq_pathways/up/"), 
                            all.files = FALSE, 
                            full.names = FALSE, 
                            recursive = FALSE,
                            pattern = "^allterms.*_up\\.tsv$")  
# read in dn TB pathways
microarray_dn_pathways = list.files(path = here("data/v2/microarray_pathways/dn/"), 
                            all.files = FALSE, 
                            full.names = FALSE, 
                            recursive = FALSE,
                            pattern = "^allterms.*_dn\\.tsv$")
rnaseq_dn_pathways = list.files(path = here("data/v2/RNAseq_pathways/dn/"), 
                            all.files = FALSE, 
                            full.names = FALSE, 
                            recursive = FALSE,
                            pattern = "^allterms.*_dn\\.tsv$")

microarray_up_pathways_list <- list()
for (up_path_micro in microarray_up_pathways) {
  up_path_pathways_df <- read_tsv(here(paste0("data/v2/microarray_pathways/up/", up_path_micro)))
  up_path_pathway_vals <- up_path_pathways_df$asinh_observed_expected
  # store the pathway vector in a named list
  up_path_micro = gsub("_up.tsv", "", up_path_micro)
  up_path_micro = gsub("allterms_GO_ORA_BGcorrected_", "", up_path_micro)
  microarray_up_pathways_list[[up_path_micro]] <- up_path_pathway_vals
}

microarray_dn_pathways_list <- list()
for (dn_path_micro in microarray_dn_pathways) {
  dn_path_pathways_df <- read_tsv(here(paste0("data/v2/microarray_pathways/dn/", dn_path_micro)))
  dn_path_pathway_vals <- dn_path_pathways_df$asinh_observed_expected
  # store the pathway vector in a named list
  dn_path_micro = gsub("_dn.tsv", "", dn_path_micro)
  dn_path_micro = gsub("allterms_GO_ORA_BGcorrected_", "", dn_path_micro)
  microarray_dn_pathways_list[[dn_path_micro]] <- dn_path_pathway_vals
}

rnaseq_up_pathways_list <- list()
for (up_path_rnaseq in rnaseq_up_pathways) {
  up_path_pathways_df <- read_tsv(here(paste0("data/v2/RNAseq_pathways/up/", up_path_rnaseq)))
  rows_with_all_na <- rowSums(is.na(up_path_pathways_df)) == ncol(up_path_pathways_df)
  up_path_pathways_df_clean <- up_path_pathways_df[!rows_with_all_na, ]
  up_path_pathway_vals <- up_path_pathways_df_clean$asinh_observed_expected
  # store the pathway vector in a named list
  up_path_rnaseq = gsub("_up.tsv", "", up_path_rnaseq)
  up_path_rnaseq = gsub("allterms_GO_ORA_BGcorrected_", "", up_path_rnaseq)
  rnaseq_up_pathways_list[[up_path_rnaseq]] <- up_path_pathway_vals 
}

rnaseq_dn_pathways_list <- list()
for (dn_path_rnaseq in rnaseq_dn_pathways) {
  dn_path_pathways_df <- read_tsv(here(paste0("data/v2/RNAseq_pathways/dn/", dn_path_rnaseq)))
  rows_with_all_na <- rowSums(is.na(dn_path_pathways_df)) == ncol(dn_path_pathways_df)
  dn_path_pathways_df_clean <- dn_path_pathways_df[!rows_with_all_na, ]
  dn_path_pathway_vals <- dn_path_pathways_df_clean$asinh_observed_expected
  # store the pathway vector in a named list
  dn_path_rnaseq = gsub("_dn.tsv", "", dn_path_rnaseq)
  dn_path_rnaseq = gsub("allterms_GO_ORA_BGcorrected_", "", dn_path_rnaseq)
  rnaseq_dn_pathways_list[[dn_path_rnaseq]] <- dn_path_pathway_vals
}

up_pathway_list = c(microarray_up_pathways_list, rnaseq_up_pathways_list)
dn_pathway_list = c(microarray_dn_pathways_list, rnaseq_dn_pathways_list)

get_pathway_similarity_matrix <- function(pathway_val_lists){
  # initialize an empty matrix
  n <- length(pathway_val_lists)
  similarity_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = n, ncol = n)
  rownames(similarity_matrix) <- colnames(similarity_matrix) <- names(pathway_val_lists)

  # fill in the matrix with intersection sizes
  for (i in 1:n) {
    for (j in 1:n) {
      similarity_matrix[i, j] <- cor.test(pathway_val_lists[[i]], pathway_val_lists[[j]], method = "pearson")$estimate
    }
  }

  return(similarity_matrix)
}

up_pathway_similarity_matrix = get_pathway_similarity_matrix(up_pathway_list)
dn_pathway_similarity_matrix = get_pathway_similarity_matrix(dn_pathway_list)
```

```{r set up color annotations}
summary_df <- read.delim(here("figures/annotation_table.tsv"), sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
# Define tissue short names
tissue_map <- c(
  "blood_pmbc"                         = "PBMC",
  "blood_pbmc"                         = "PBMC",
  "blood_PBMC"                         = "PBMC",
  "blood_whole_blood"                  = "whole_blood",
  "blood_monocytes"                    = "monocyte",
  "blood_monocyte"                     = "monocyte",
  "blood_monocyte_derived_macrophages" = "mono_macro",
  "blood_monocyte_derived_macrophage"  = "mono_macro",
  "blood_macrophage"                   = "macro_blood",
  "PBMC_macrophage"                    = "PBMC_macro",
  "blood_dendritic_cells"              = "DC_blood",
  "blood_dcs"                          = "DC_blood",
  "blood_lymphatic_endothelial_cell"   = "endo_blood",
  "blood_THP-1"                        = "THP1_macro",
  "THP-1"                              = "THP1_macro",
  "blood_marcophages"                  = "macro_blood",  # assuming typo for "macrophages"
  "blood_blood"                        = "blood",
  "blood"                              = "blood",
  "lymphnode_lymphnode"                = "lymphnode",
  "BAL_bronchoalveolar_lavage"         = "BAL",
  "BALF_alveolar_macrophage"           = "alveolar_macro_BALF",
  "lung_ILC1"                          = "ILC1_lung",
  "lung_ILC2"                          = "ILC2_lung",
  "lung_ILC3neg"                       = "ILC3neg_lung",
  "lung_ILC3pos"                       = "ILC3pos_lung",
  "lung_NK"                            = "NK_lung",
  "lung_susp"                          = "lung_cells",
  "HEPG2_HepG2"                        = "HepG2_cells"
)

# Define tissue & technology colors
tissue_colors <- c(
  # Blood-related (red/orange tones)
  "PBMC"                  = "#E41A1C",
  "whole_blood"           = "#B22222",
  "monocyte"              = "#FF4500",
  "mono_macro"            = "#FF6347",
  "macro_blood"           = "#FF7F50",
  "PBMC_macro"            = "#FF8C00",
  "DC_blood"              = "#CD5C5C",
  "endo_blood"            = "#FA8072",
  "blood"                 = "#DC143C",

  # Lung-related (blue/green tones)
  "alveolar_macro_BALF"   = "#009E73",
  "ILC1_lung"             = "#1F78B4",
  "ILC2_lung"             = "#33A02C",
  "ILC3neg_lung"          = "#66C2A5",
  "ILC3pos_lung"          = "#A6D854",
  "NK_lung"               = "#377EB8",
  "lung_cells"            = "#5CA8C8",
  "BAL"                   = "#41B6C4",

  # Cell lines (grey/purple tones)
  "THP1_macro"            = "#7F7F7F",  # grey
  "HepG2_cells"           = "#BC80BD",  # muted purple

  # Other tissues
  "lymphnode"             = "#FDB462"
)


tech_colors <- c(
  "RNAseq" = "#E69F00",
  "microarray" = "#56B4E9"
)

origin_colors <- c(
  "cell line" = "#D55E00",
  "primary" = "#009E73"
)

# Prepare metadata/matrix
meta_df <- summary_df[1:35,] %>%
  mutate(
    tissue_short = recode(tissue_cell_type, !!!tissue_map)
  )

# Create top and bottom annotations
ha_bottom <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  tissue_cell = meta_df$tissue_short,
  tb_type = meta_df$tb_status,
  origin_type = meta_df$sample_origin,
  technology = meta_df$technology,
  col = list(
    technology = tech_colors,
    tissue_cell = tissue_colors,
    origin_type = origin_colors,
    tb_type = tb_colors
  ),
  annotation_name_side = "right",
  annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
  annotation_legend_param = list(
    technology = list(
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15)
    ),
    tissue_cell = list(
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15)
    ),
    origin_type = list(
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15)
    ),
    tb_type = list(
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15)
    )
  )
)

ha_left <- rowAnnotation(
  technology = meta_df$technology,
  origin_type = meta_df$sample_origin,
  tb_type = meta_df$tb_status,
  tissue_cell = meta_df$tissue_short,
  col = list(technology = tech_colors,
             tissue_cell = tissue_colors,
             origin_type = origin_colors,
             tb_type = tb_colors),
  annotation_name_side = "top",
  show_legend = FALSE,
  annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
  
  annotation_legend_param = list(
    technology = list(
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15)
    ),
    tissue_cell = list(
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15)
    ),
    origin_type = list(
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15)
    )
  )
)
```

```{r}
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)

annotation_table <- meta_df
viz_mat_up <- up_gene_jaccard_matrix


common_ids <- intersect(rownames(viz_mat_up), annotation_table[["SIGNATURE_NAME"]])
annotation_subset <- annotation_table[annotation_table[["SIGNATURE_NAME"]] %in% common_ids, ]
annotation_sorted <- annotation_subset[order(annotation_subset[["number"]]), ]
sorted_ids <- annotation_sorted[["SIGNATURE_NAME"]]
viz_mat_up <- viz_mat_up[sorted_ids, sorted_ids]

colnames(viz_mat_up) <- annotation_sorted$dataset_signature_ID
row.names(viz_mat_up) <- annotation_sorted$dataset_signature_ID

# diag(viz_mat_up) <- NA

# define the output file path
pdf(file = here("figures/up_pathway_similarity_matrix.pdf"), width = 35, height = 35)

up_pathway_similarity_vector <- as.vector(up_pathway_similarity_matrix)
ninetyfive_percentile <- quantile(up_pathway_similarity_vector, probs = 0.95)
five_percentile <- quantile(up_pathway_similarity_vector, probs = 0.05)
# Define color function
col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(0, five_percentile, ninetyfive_percentile),
  c("white","lightgreen" , "darkgreen")
)
ht <- Heatmap(
  viz_mat_up,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  name = "Pearson correlation",
  col = col_fun,
  column_names_rot = 45,
  column_names_side = "top",
  bottom_annotation = ha_bottom,
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
  na_col = "white",
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15)
  ),
  width = unit(30, "cm"),
  height = unit(30, "cm")
)

# Draw the heatmap AND the custom legend
# The 'annotation_legend_list' argument adds new legend
draw(ha_left + ht, 
     heatmap_legend_side = "left",
     annotation_legend_side = "left")

# Close the PDF device
dev.off()

```

```{r}
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)

annotation_table <- meta_df
viz_mat_dn <- dn_gene_jaccard_matrix

common_ids <- intersect(rownames(viz_mat_dn), annotation_table[["SIGNATURE_NAME"]])
annotation_subset <- annotation_table[annotation_table[["SIGNATURE_NAME"]] %in% common_ids, ]
annotation_sorted <- annotation_subset[order(annotation_subset[["number"]]), ]
sorted_ids <- annotation_sorted[["SIGNATURE_NAME"]]
viz_mat_dn <- viz_mat_dn[sorted_ids, sorted_ids]

colnames(viz_mat_dn) <- annotation_sorted$dataset_signature_ID
row.names(viz_mat_dn) <- annotation_sorted$dataset_signature_ID

#diag(viz_mat_dn) <- NA

# define the output file path
pdf(file = here("figures/dn_pathway_similarity_matrix.pdf"), width = 35, height = 35)

dn_pathway_similarity_vector <- as.vector(dn_pathway_similarity_matrix)
ninetyfive_percentile <- quantile(dn_pathway_similarity_vector, probs = 0.95)
five_percentile <- quantile(dn_pathway_similarity_vector, probs = 0.05)
# Define color function
col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(0, five_percentile, ninetyfive_percentile),
  c("white","lightblue" , "blue")
)
ht <- Heatmap(
  viz_mat_dn,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  name = "Pearson correlation",
  col = col_fun,
  column_names_rot = 45,
  column_names_side = "top",
  bottom_annotation = ha_bottom,
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
  na_col = "white",
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15)
  ),
  width = unit(30, "cm"),
  height = unit(30, "cm")
)

# Draw the heatmap AND the custom legend
# The 'annotation_legend_list' argument adds new legend
draw(ha_left + ht, 
     heatmap_legend_side = "left",
     annotation_legend_side = "left")

# Close the PDF device
dev.off()

```
